influencers.name: Andrej Karpathy
influencers.known_for: Foundational neural-net teaching (nanoGPT, micrograd, Zero-to-Hero); ex-Tesla AI director, ex-OpenAI founding member.

influencers.name: Simon Willison
influencers.known_for: Datasette + llm CLI; daily-updated practical AI blog at simonwillison.net widely cited as the definitive 'what changed today' source for working devs.

influencers.name: Yann LeCun
influencers.known_for: Turing Award (2018) for deep learning; runs FAIR; loudest LLM-skeptic among major-lab leaders.

influencers.name: Andrew Ng
influencers.known_for: Defined the modern ML teaching arc (Coursera ML, DL specialization); 'The Batch' weekly is widely-read industry briefing.

influencers.name: Sam Altman
influencers.known_for: CEO of the company that shipped ChatGPT and defined the consumer-AI moment; every utterance moves the AI news cycle.

influencers.name: Dario Amodei
influencers.known_for: Anthropic CEO and primary public voice on AI safety + scaling laws; 'Machines of Loving Grace' essay widely cited as the optimist counter to AI-doom framing.

influencers.name: Demis Hassabis
influencers.known_for: DeepMind founder/CEO; Nobel Chemistry 2024 (AlphaFold); leads Google's frontier-model effort post-Brain merger.

influencers.name: Ilya Sutskever
influencers.known_for: Co-founded OpenAI; co-developed AlexNet (2012) that catalyzed the deep-learning era; left OpenAI 2024 to start SSI focused on aligned superintelligence.

influencers.name: Ethan Mollick
influencers.known_for: Wharton management prof whose AI-at-work newsletter ('One Useful Thing') is the most-cited source for AI-in-knowledge-work analysis.

influencers.name: Nathan Lambert
influencers.role: Researcher, Allen AI; author of Interconnects
influencers.known_for: Open-source model researcher at AI2; Interconnects newsletter is the deepest weekly source on frontier-model architecture + training trends.

influencers.name: Aravind Srinivas
influencers.known_for: Built Perplexity into the leading consumer AI-search alternative to Google in 18 months; vocal on the AI-search dynamics.

influencers.name: Mira Murati
influencers.known_for: Ex-OpenAI CTO; founded Thinking Machines Lab in 2025 with ~$1B+ seed for fundamental research; one of the most-watched new AI labs.

influencers.name: Eliezer Yudkowsky
influencers.known_for: Most prominent AI-doom advocate; co-founded MIRI; widely cited in alignment discourse even by those who disagree with his conclusions.

influencers.name: François Chollet
influencers.role: Creator of Keras; founder, Ndea + ARC Prize
influencers.known_for: Created Keras (now part of TensorFlow); designed ARC-AGI benchmark; left Google to start Ndea + ARC Prize, central in the 'is LLM scaling enough?' debate.

influencers.name: Jeremy Howard
influencers.known_for: fast.ai courses opened deep learning to non-PhDs; Answer.AI ships practical LLM tooling; widely-followed voice on open-source models.

influencers.name: Lex Fridman
influencers.known_for: Podcast interviews with every major AI leader (Altman, Hassabis, Amodei, Musk, LeCun) — the closest thing to a canonical long-form AI-leader interview archive.

influencers.name: Shawn 'swyx' Wang
influencers.role: Smol AI; Latent Space podcast + newsletter
influencers.known_for: Latent Space podcast + ai.engineer summit; defined the 'AI Engineer' role as distinct from ML researcher; central node for the practical-AI community.

influencers.name: Logan Kilpatrick
influencers.role: Senior PM, Google AI Studio + Gemini API
influencers.known_for: Lead public-face of Google's Gemini API; ex-OpenAI developer relations; high signal on Google-side dev launches.

influencers.name: Boris Cherny
influencers.role: Engineer, Anthropic; lead on Claude Code
influencers.known_for: Tech lead on Claude Code (Anthropic's CLI agent); one of the loudest practical voices on agentic coding systems.

influencers.name: Jim Fan
influencers.known_for: Embodied-AI + robot-foundation-models research; high-velocity Twitter thread breakdowns of every major frontier release.
